hero.alt: Modern contemporary timber-clad home with clean architectural lines and landscaped approach

timber-texture.alt: Close-up natural timber wood grain pattern showing precision milling

construction.alt: Timber structural frame under construction showing engineered connections

rounds.feedback: Combine best of both: V1 hero (full-bleed image bg), V2 section divider (dramatic 02 with ghost text), V2 section header arrangement, V1 footer. Floor Plans section should be a placeholder (real plans provided later — no HTML grids, no room schedule). Structural Floor Plans / Component Mapping also a placeholder (real schemas provided later — no legend, no plan grids). Keep V2 layer-by-layer specs. Seed from both variants.

variations.label: Measured Grid
variations.description: Systematic, structured approach — tight grid alignment, uniform section rhythm, horizontal rules, compact floor plan grids, layer-stack component diagrams. Information-architect energy: every element on a precise grid, utilitarian pacing, document-grade clarity.

variations.label: Open Horizon
variations.description: Dramatic editorial pacing — split hero with text above and contained image below, oversized section numbers, generous vertical whitespace, sequential full-width floor plans, centered component header, 2-column card grid for specs. Magazine energy: varied rhythm, breathing room, typographic scale contrast.

rounds.feedback: Combine best of both: V1 hero (full-bleed image bg), V2 section divider (dramatic 02 with ghost text), V2 section header arrangement, V1 footer. Floor Plans section should be a placeholder (real plans provided later). Structural Floor Plans / Component Mapping also a placeholder (real schemas provided later). Keep V2 layer-by-layer specs.

variations.label: Editorial Precision
variations.description: Tight editorial pacing with V1 full-bleed hero, V2 dramatic section divider with ghost text, V2 section headers with decorative rules, V2 pip-dot component details in 2-column grid, V1 footer structure. Floor Plans and Structural Plans as placeholders. Disciplined spacing rhythm, structured composition.

variations.label: Breathing Architecture
variations.description: Generous whitespace and vertical storytelling with V1 full-bleed hero, V2 dramatic section divider with ghost text (92vh), V2 section headers with decorative rules, V2 pip-dot component details in single-column layout (max-width 40rem), V1 footer. Floor Plans and Structural Plans as placeholders. Larger section numbers (up to 13rem), extra breathing padding tier (section-breathe: 10-14rem), more dramatic type scale contrast.

rounds.feedback: Replace conventional top navbar with a creative fixed right-side navbar. Use glass/frosted effects. Be creative with the navigation placement and interaction.

variations.label: Vertical Meridian
variations.description: Minimal glass rail fixed to the right edge — dot-based section indicators with hover-reveal labels that fly out as frosted glass tooltips. Vertical progress track connects dots. Desktop: narrow 4rem rail with body offset; mobile: bottom glass bar. Wordmark rotated vertically at rail top. Architectural elevator-column energy — the nav is a quiet measurement instrument, not a menu.

variations.label: Glass Spine
variations.description: Expandable frosted glass panel on the right — collapsed shows only section numbers (01–08) in a vertical stack, hover expands to 15rem revealing full section names, act groupings (Act I/II/III), decorative dividers, and a contact email footer. Numbers get orange accent on active section with a left border indicator. Desktop: smooth cubic-bezier width transition; mobile: bottom bar with number+label pairs. The nav tells the story structure — it's a table of contents that breathes.
